channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: /smg/ - stock market genera — 46 replies — 184.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/smg/ - stock market genera

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-07-03 04:05 UTC

OP

Believe edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>Previous:
>>62440882

Early replies (first 3)

62441894
OH MY FUCKING GOD
MY FIRST SHORT, ON MEMORY
IS THIS REAL

62441896
Various stocks have massive issues. K1, PFIC, or Collectable taxation. What a headache. On that note I want to double check, GDXU, GDX, SILJ, and SIL are safe right? I don't want a headache from these ETFs.

>>62441443
Uhh what, how???

>>62441714
Hmm a very curious situation, big groups have to choose between
>pump it so Michael Burry loses, but retail gets wealthy
>dump it so retail loses, but Michael Burry finally wins a new big short

62441898
did you guys have a good pride month?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62441924
Rumor on the street is that russia is going to pull out of Ukraine.
I say nothing ever happens.

62441925
Anyone Else here like Jews

62441926
>>62441919
>reading the news and studying fundamentals
ngmi
you should be reading astrology and studying lines on chart

62441929
>>62441925
im a goy who shills for the Js.
we have epsteinbearanon and baggler who are actual Js.

and then we have about 30 stealth ny jews pretending to be polchuds to bully sensitive califronia jews because they think its funny.

62441930
Did gooks save my semi portfolio yet or are they continuing to rape it?

62441931
I'm close to hitting my retirement numbers but I don't know what to do. I don't want a house or a Porsche. I don't want a wife. I don't want to travel or write a novel. I'm kind of lost. I just sit on my couch listening to music wondering if there something more for me but finding nothing.

62441932
BEARS!! Where are you? I need comfort!!

62441933
>>62441919
>OpenAI dumping Nvidia
Lmao. You're so fucking retarded. Those broadcom chips they're working on are ONLY FOR INFERENCE. They still need a shitload of nvidia chips to actually train the models that then run on those chips. The entire inference market is in a race to the bottom with Google's Tensor already beating them to the punch and those inference models can already run on Intel and AMD GPUs. I don't think Nvidia is even interested in getting into mass volume plays like this with memory being marked up so much eating into margins. They'd rather just be the kings of training and launch absurdly priced behemoths.
I don't even know why you goyim try to deal in the real world when you can't even comprehend the world around you. So arrogant yet so fucking dumb.

62441940
Ns and Js

62441942
>>62441937
>week full of uneventful earnings from no names

you already know war is gonna escalate on this week

62441944
kevin please
jerome please
bessent please
u have three days to fix this mess
we need a mega pump asap

62441945
>>62441929
>>62441933

And look at that!
I was trying to be nice with a shout out!

Anyway, how much are you down this week bud?
I think probably a lot, considering you were shilling SNDK constantly.

You guys think far too literally and not analogically.
The headline is that AI labs have had enough.

If you saw NVDAs price action today, you'd know perfectly well that it joever, every pump instantly failed.

62441946
>>62441892
When do we buy coal stocks again bros

62441947
>>62441937
why does this always list irrelevant companies? about a month ago this shit didn't even show QCOM and that thing fucking mooned after earnings

62441948
i full ported TSLL and TQQQ just before market close

62441952
>>62441931
Once you drive a real car you wont go back to economy garbage. And as for house/travel, once you experience a tier1 city you wont want to go back to the boonies

62441954
>>62441929
I love that we have actual jews here and even they still lose a fuckton of money.
Kind of defeats the purpose of being a greasy money goblin.
Whatever. I guess I'd only truly be mad if they were zionist losers.

62441955
>>62441930
SK hynix Inc. (000660.KS)
2,288,000.00 +101,000.00 (+4.62%)

Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. (005930.KS)
304,500.00 +18,500.00 (+6.46%)

KOSPI Composite Index (^KS11)
7,875.99 +227.90 (+2.98%)

Source: Yahoo Finance

62441956
>>62441952
Jew York sucks. Tokyo'd be worth living in though.

62441958
>>62441945
I shilled KMB and CELH this week because all you goyim are good for is consuming energy drinks and shitting into diapers and if you listened to me you'd be up 8% on diapers and 16% on energy drinks. I literally just want to help you but all you know how to do is be anti-semetic. Sad.
My overall port is merely up 4% this week due to a couple of stinkers, but that's okay. Thanks for asking though.

62441960
>>62441931
damn bro you're a semi retired multi millionaire in good headlth but you're bored sometimes. that's rough man. really feelin for you bro. its rough out there. we all have our cross to bear, huh?

62441961
>this is how I picture /smg/ in real life.

62441962
>>62441923
What even is a Facebook ai agent supposed to do?

62441964
>>62441961
That's the life you could be living if you stopped dealing in the real world

62441966
>>62441956
Im just starting my traveling and havent got to the city yet. I just saw a lot of the rest of the usa though and its pretty miserable, im glad my car is fast

62441967
>>62441961
None of us will ever be able to afford such luxury

62441968
>>62441960
why do poor people always get butthurt when i post this?

62441970
>>62441958
>anti-semetic
Are you able to read?
I just said I'm a J-fan retard.

62441972
>>62441961
normally people just get pets and treat them as their child if they wanted kids and have no prospects of ever getting them, this isnt very haram

item.title: BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan? — 78 replies — 112.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan?

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-07-03 03:25 UTC

OP

BTC is down again, but are you buying the dip or waiting for lower prices?

>Do you think this is just a normal correction, or is there more downside ahead? What's your strategy?

Early replies (first 3)

62426518
I've been shorting this garbage all month

62426527
>>62426518
Wow, you've got good profit by now then?

62426535
>>62426527
up 80% on some 2x short BTC etf

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62434990
>>62433844
Twins?! Who

62434999
>>62433844
Twins?! Who's your bet? Lol

62435029
>>62433961
If there were really no users, I don't think we'd still be seeing institutions, ETFs, and developers building around Bitcoin.

62435427
>>62433884
Why do you like sending beauty women

62437132
>>62432200
It's just another hype

62437198
>>62435029
Are ETFs manipulated?

62437208
>>62434984
What's tbv?

62437216
>>62427317
Money printing obviously

62437422
>>62426512
Continue to troll any and all retards who hold any kind of crypto.

62437563
>>62437208
Basically a way to use native BTC as collateral without wrapping it or handing custody to someone else.

62437565
>>62437198
Every large market gets influenced by big players. The hard part is separating normal market activity from actual manipulation.

62437571
>>62437422
Seems like a waste of energy, but you do you.

62437623
>>62426759
nice my fren

62437628
>>62437563
I don't think it's a good idea

62437631
Btc is going 1million

62438074
>>62437628
What part worries you the most? For me, it comes down to the risk model. I'd be way more skeptical if I had to hand my BTC over to a custodian.

62438081
>>62433854
Time will tell which of us got it right.

62438118
>>62426537
cool, sounds like mumus will have a "great" time.

62438272
>>62438118
What's that?

62438282
>>62426512
I soldeded months ago. I dont believe in btc and never had. BTC couldnt even outperform motherfucking spy for the past 5 years so dont give me """""zoom out""""". more money to be made in stocks anway, no reason to be married to bitcoin.

62438284
>>62426512
>What's your strategy?
Apeing every goycheck.

62438322
>>62437565
ngmi

62438328
>>62438284
Buy kendu and ansem

62438410
>>62438328
No.

62439167
>>62433595
Saw the Aegis partnership, now Utila too. They're lining up some solid collaborations.

62439181
>>62437631
loved the confidence

62439236
>>62438282
then why are you here

62439758
>>62438074
With that risk model, I don't think anyone needs to hand over their custody.

Self custody is part of what it's designed for.

62440739
>>62439758
what about in an exchange like binance

62441904
>>62439167
Maybe they have more coming that we just don't know about yet. It's actually a good sign that they're still building despite the current market conditions.

item.title: So freaking mad rn — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
So freaking mad rn

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-07-03 04:04 UTC

OP

My 13 yo son identifies as a Crypto expert
He told one of his teachers about it and the teacher told him that crypto is worthless and will never become real currency
He came home crying. It's already been a tough period for him because of the bear market. Now he's despondent and says he doesn't want to live anymore
HOW CAN SOMEONE DO THAT TO A KID!?
Crypto is just as much a currency as other currencies and people need to respect that!
I'm trying to get the teacher fired

Early replies (first 3)

62441136
>>62441109
Imagine taking investment advice from an elementary school teacher.

62441139
what a cruel world we live in!

62441146
>>62441136
school should be a safe space for alternative investors like my son
not everyone is into stocks and bonds

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62441150
>>62441109
Let me guess: You identify as a "Crypto expert" yourself, you got your son into collecting and trading these "tokens" and "currencies" yourself, and you've been grooming him to take even riskier bets and experiment with increasingly degenerate varieties of "shitcoins." Not too far off the mark?

62441163
>>62441150
He came out to me by himself after i gave him a children's book about crypto
How else would he know what investments he likes??
You're just mad you missed out
me and my son will laugh when BC hits a million

62441200
anudda OCPD tranny ESL thread

62441263
>>62441109
I wish my kid was a crypto expert. Instead all he does is ask where momma is. Lil shit your mom doesn't want you anymore

62441369
>>62441109
reddit tier fake story yawn.

62441410
lel

62441431
>>62441109
can i be ufr son?

62441437
>>62441109
this is how school shooters are made

62441491
>>62441369
>smartest /biz/ziger

62441668
>>62441109
kek

62441691
>>62441146
Schools exist to fill children's minds with doom and gloom, to convince them their lives will be worse than anyone before. You shouldn't fight it, just withdraw your child from the institution that seeks to destroy him.

62441713
>>62441691
umm who's gonna take care of him during my day shift? some of us actually work for a living

62441725
>>62441713
oh sorry ok let the government brainwash your child then

62441794
>>62441725
schools just need to be more crypto inclusive

62441950
>>62441200
Why do you keep spamming this? What do you hope to achieve by going after someone who by your own admission can't be stopped?

62441969
>>62441109
based /biz/raeli

I hope that your son realizes that the only valid "crypto" is Bitcoin and that he shouldn't ever engage in shitcoinery.

62440326
I bet she has a really good v

62440528

62441949

62441965

item.title: Five years since I bought 1 ICP for £154 — 18 replies — 12.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Five years since I bought 1 ICP for £154

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-07-03 02:38 UTC

OP

Five years since I bought 1 ICP for £154

Early replies (first 3)

62438170
>>62438105
yikes

62438389
>>62438105
Meh that aint a big loss.
There are cunts that loss 6 figures to that shit

62438426
i dont give a fuck faggot LOL

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62438461
>>62438105
Haha, people did this

62438471
>>62438105
congrats on your x0.0100

62438539
I'm starting to have doubts about moonman

62438624
>>62438105
what would happen (hypothetically of course) if i was to fart in that nozzle whilst she slept?

62438638
>>62438105
I'm having terrible sleep for the past few years and I want to get a sleep study but it cost 1500+ to do it

62440342
>>62438638
samesies

62440432
>>62438638
The best I;ve slept in my life was doing like 17-21 hours on then a 9 hour sleep period. As you can imagine this does no work for modern societal living but damn did I ever sleep fantastic and wake up feeling amazing.

62440599
>>62438105
That's you listening to Insane Clowne Posse on your Walkmen in the photo?

62440675
>>62438638
Just buy a whoop and sleep with it for a couple of weeks to get a decent average. Almost all pro athletes use it for in-depth sleep analysis

62440744
>>62440675
thafacksawhoop?

62441605
>>62438638
get insurance, the study is super cheap if you have the right insurance, and then make sure to look for any stipulation that you have to keep the insurance plan or use the machine a specific amount of time. If you are clean and maintain it the replacable parts are pretty cheap and the machine itself will run forever

62441786
>>62438105
I remember when it was getting shilled here after its listing on coinbase
It was $600 and shills were INSISTING that it was worth way more

62441790
>>62438638
Try this:
>no eating for at least 3 hours before bed
>no alcohol
>limit caffeine intake, and don't have any after noon.
>no screens for at least 30 minutes before bed
>keep lighting low at night
>keep room temp below 70
>use black out curtains
>sleep on your side, or elevate your bed if you absolutely must sleep on your back
>use a nasal dilator or nose strips to increase airflow
>hum for about a minute before bed; it increase nitric oxide and relaxes airways
>change your sheets regularly, make sure you don't have mold in your room
>replace your pillow if it's more than 2 years old
>be consistent about all of this for 3 weeks

If you're not doing better after 3 weeks of this see a doctor.

62441818
>>62438105
>1
This is barely loss. I lost considerably more on mutant salmon.

62441830
>>62438105
ICP is trading at $2.02, only 9.05% above it's all time low. Things couldn't get any worse, right?? LMAO

item.title: 270,000 BTC accumulated by whales at $59k. — 13 replies — 11.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
270,000 BTC accumulated by whales at $59k.

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-07-03 02:56 UTC

OP

270,000 BTC accumulated by whales at $59k. largest single accumulation spike ever recorded on chain. bigger than the covid bottom (150k BTC). bigger than the FTX bottom (180k BTC). ETF outflows hit $4.5b in june but that capital rotated to semis, not cash. the entities selling BTC face quarterly redemptions and compliance committees armed with citi's $82k target. the entities buying have no reporting requirements and no redemption pressure. LTH SOPR at 0.615 last printed in july 2023 at $25k-$31k before the run to $73k. forced sellers are finite. voluntary buyers at record size are not.

Early replies (first 3)

62437479
>goygold

62437480
Epstein pedo coin hot garbage

62437657
>>62437459
Wagmi

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62437662
>>62437459
>no source for any of this
kill yourself faggot

62437803
>>62437459
I would be in awe if it were true

62438096
>>62437459
Based. Dont fall for the astroturfer fuddies.

62439094
>>62437459
TGBR

62439184
>>62437459
>270,000 BTC accumulated by whales at $59k. l
Nice

>A giant whale has accumulated about 270,000 BTC near 59,000.
> The $60,000 level already reached a total of 600,000 BTC in accumulation yesterday!
https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/340314342087282

$36 Billion dollar accumulation.
Gee, I wonder who could that be.
>US gov?

62441693
>>62437662
onchain analytics

62441712
210,000 bitcoin is 1% of the supply

270k is barely more than 1%

thats still another 99% that can be dumped on ur heads

62441789
>>62441712
price is traded at the margin

62441793
>>62439184
>$36bil
it's literally nothing

62441865
All-in with bitcoin. Buying more every time the faggots on this board say it is over. Feels so good to support twitter normies.

item.title: The psychology of a wagie really is that they don’t know what to do with themselves. — 15 replies — 10.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
The psychology of a wagie really is that they don’t know what to do with themselves.

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-07-03 02:42 UTC

OP

The psychology of a wagie really is that they don’t know what to do with themselves. They don’t know how to occupy their minds. So the people who make fun of wagies are misplaced. NEETS can’t comprehend wagies working for 65 years just to get some fake gold watch at the end because they know how to occupy their minds.

Early replies (first 3)

62441635
>he thinks he's getting a gold watch

This ain't the 1950s bud

62441639
Why do you even bother thinking about goyim who quite clearly deal in the real world

62441644
Below a certain caste you need to give clear and immediate instructions to certain people every minute of the day to keep them from going feral and biting you. The same way you would train an ox to spin a grinder wheel

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62441667
I am almost 40, dropped out of high-school at 15, been NEET my entire adult life.

The only "depressing" aspect of it is not having tons of disposable cash like normies do, but actually most normies dont even have that anymore because of how brutal cost of living has become with everyone been squeezed for every dollar they make for basic necessitates

Not to brag about it, but it seems like the more times goes on the more of an argument there is for NEETing.

Like i started NEETing in the early 2000's, and the reasons to be a NEET have only gone up exponentially since then.

Back then Western countries were much Whiter, the women were way less feminist, the were no trannies, it was way less Jewish overall..... and I still NEET'd, because I saw where the world was heading, and I ended up being right

I guess you could call me the canary in the coal mine.

That said I do agree I could have built up a decent life if I worked as I could have easily got on the ladder last minute just before it got pulled up.... I'm not gonna deny that fact.

But what I mean now is, if I was 15-20 years old again in 2026, I would 100% be NEETing without a doubt lmao, the game of life is WAY worse now compared to when I started NEETing 20+ years ago

62441673
>>62441667
nigga HOW RICH are ur fucking parents for u to be able to drop out at 10th grade and turbo perma NEET for 3 decades almost...

62441680
>>62441673
They are not rich at all, not even wealthy. My parents are extremely conflict avoidant.

It's not like it costs much to have one of ur kids sticking. Its not like theyre paying for education or hobbies or entertainment or whatever.

I use some of the electricity, food, water, etc - an extra person in the household doesn't cost that much more.

62441681
>>62441680
true but i mean, what do u do all day for years without any money? Surely they have to give u a little bit of allowance so u can do stuff... unless u just literally sit inside 24/7

62441689
>>62441681
Normgroids don't do "stuff" either.

62441697
>>62441689
yeah they do since they have money.. they take MMA classes, go to gym, join rec sports groups after work and many other things..

because they have money. None of this is possible if u have no money, except i guess sports leagues those are free

62441701
>>62441681
Gym membership is cheap, $10/month

Rest of my time is spent at home online, on my PC, laptop or phone.

Internet my parents need and use all the time, so thats paid for by them.

I buy my clothes on eBay from china and havent needed to replace any of it in 10+ years now

I live very frugally, so frugally that my gibs me dat payments im able to mostly save.

62441715
>>62441697
>gym

62441728
>>62441715
Mentally unwell people have lot of sex.
Bring back vaccine again.

62441736
>>62441701
That and the primary high IQ activity is reading, which is basically free now.

Wagies are too stupid to read.

62441738
>>62441728
True.

62441839
>>62441667
Good post. I realized it wasn’t worth it also before everyone else realized it wasn’t worth it. Imagine having 11 year old kids now. Anxiety would be off the charts.

item.title: How Much Did You GAIN in Crypto Last Year? — 13 replies — 10.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
How Much Did You GAIN in Crypto Last Year?

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-07-03 02:51 UTC

OP

> President Donald Trump reported nearly $1.2 billion in earnings last year, with the bulk of the income coming from cryptocurrency ventures and branded merchandise, according to a new federal financial disclosure.

>The filing shows more than $500 million from World Liberty Financial and over $600 million from meme coin sales through CIC Digital. Trump also earned millions more from sales of branded Bibles, sneakers, and watches.

>The disclosure highlights how Trump’s newer business ventures are generating more revenue than parts of his traditional real estate empire.

>Are you surprised by how much Trump made outside of real estate?

Early replies (first 3)

62433082
>>62433062
no

62433083
>>62433062
This 1 Post Is Good. Yaaaaayyy 2026!

62433085
>>62433062
I lost 1.2B last year.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62435388
>>62433062
UPDATE! It was just blind luck!

62435393
>>62435388
how come politicians are so lucky?

62435784
>>62435393
They’re smart!

62438018
>>62433062
i lost 1.2 billion on Trump Melania and Liberty FInance
I literally got rugged in all 3 of them, by hte kike president of the US
He and all off his useless family should get actually lynced for that shit
why are we sitting here, after we lose all of our money to this faggot and than we congratulate him on the money he stole from us?
Why are we so fcking retarded?

62438031
Seems like the big money is in selling crypto and not buying it.

62438178
>>62433062
>fleeced by the Trumps
Kek it couldn't have happened to more deserving people.

62438256
>>62438018
>why are we sitting here, after we lose all of our money to this faggot
>we
Why are you sitting here after YOU lost money to him?

>why are we so retarded?
>we
You are. I didn’t lose money to him.

62438288
>>62433062
Still better than socialism.

62441494
>>62438256
Should he be standing?

62441857
>>62438018
should we be standing?

if you can get laid in the west you wont attract good women in the 3rd world, you are just going to pay the access to brown 5/10's

This is saarcope and you know it. Tiny browlettes in jungle countries unironically melt when 6ft snowchads pinch their tits.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

fight club told us this in 1999

>>62433180
And in a few years woman become barren and washed up, you could still get to know more of her female friends after knwoing her by 20s, but by 30s she become totally invisible and you would not get to know more of woman from her because there is none left.

62433199
>>62425420
I miss him insulting me and telling me I am a worthless loser for wanting to code

62433238
>>62430416
Can you go into a little bit more detail about your favorite country in Europe for this and how you actually meet the women? genuine question

62433325
After age 43, she continued to manipulate your decisions about your health and body, insisting on procedures or treatments you didn’t want. After age 45, she held you hostage emotionally, threatening to withdraw love and support if you didn’t comply with her demands. After age 50, she manipulated your retirement plans, forcing you to work longer or retire earlier against your wishes. After age 55, she controlled your social interactions, forbidding you from reconnecting with old friends or family members.

After age 60, she exerted pressure to change your will and estate plans, ensuring she inherits everything regardless of your true wishes. After age 65, she manipulated your healthcare decisions, dictating treatments and medications for her benefit. After age 70, she threatened to cut you off financially or emotionally if you didn’t do as she demanded. After age 75, she kept you hostage in the relationship through guilt and fear, refusing to let you live your own life or find happiness elsewhere.

After age 80, she exerted control over your daily routines, dictating your activities and social outings. After age 85, she manipulated your perceptions of reality, making you doubt your memory or judgment. After age 90, she continued her emotional hostage tactics, insisting that her needs and desires came before yours, even as you aged and became more vulnerable.

62433374
>>62425420
id rather die a virgin than have sex with anything other than a white woman

62433382
>>62425500
Brown penis sleeves turn into quivering slugs when they gaze upon glorious white men

62438055
Never listen to celebrities

62438086
>>62427289
>he's prob 130-140 IQ, but he got greedy with the leverage stuff and didn't factor enough risk management.

Hello Patrick

62438094
It's extremely immoral to encourage people to "go and live like a king in the third world". 99% of people who do that will get rekt hard. If you can't make it in the 1st world, the 3rd worlders will skin you alive

62438106
He made a video once about roid idiots dying young, feeling high and mighty, seemingly not realizing that he's going to die soon.

62438212
Would be really fucking alpha if this were real. But obviously it's a made up story to puff himself up.

62438215
>>62438212
I read that "I'm smarter than you" in an angry Asian voice in my head. Lol

62438224
>>62429224
Previous guy was more correct than you. It's really just the directive to be career driven. This means education is a initiator and career is the outcome but both are symptoms of the societal directive to go that direction. As a resultess birthrate. Everything was built to cater to this one point which the Jews needed to tax two people.

62438342
>>62425420
You can just move to a poor part of the US, you get the benefits of a well functioning state, and get to larp as the lord of the trailer park or whatever..

62438356
>>62430416
You talking about eastern europe? because several of western european countries have a higher average salary than the US, and most of the others are comparable.

62438553
Americam womem are ugly, brown and fat compared to european women.

62438565
Duh, and this option is only available to men, because women don't like men who are poorer/lower status than them, but men will happily take a pretty poorer/lower status woman. The global puss trade is like the only instance where globalism benefits western men.

62439209
>>62433238
Poland is my favorite as they have very beautiful women and mild summer weather. The balkans are also great particularly Croatia. In terms of western Europe Spain is amazing and if you're in a party city like Ibiza or Barcelona there are always women from all across Europe looking to hookup.

>how you actually meet the women?
Everywhere. bars, parks, cafes, concerts, grocery stores, etc...
Nobody knows you anyway and you have nothing to lose just get in the habit of striking up a friendly conversation with everyone and you will learn to identify when girls might be open to an advance.

>>62438356
I mean I make 15k/mo on average but really I spend less than $5k and thats eating out and drinking almost everyday.

62439357
Tech Lead is the type to go fuck a rural village chink and still end up giving her half his wealth in the divorce a few years later.
You can take the kid out of the jungle and all that.

62440854
>>62439209
I’m actually planning on going to a vacation this summer to somewhere in europe. What would you recommend to a single guy who likes to party?

62440893
>>62433175
Japanese are the worst of the big 3.

62440928
western men who relocate to SEA get treated like they're paypigs no matter what their intention. if you're ok with being treated like scum and willing to pay up for the westerner price for things, it is a way to save some money. if you settle down with a local woman, you will of course be required to pay for her and all of her extended family's wellbeing.

62441066
>>62425420
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62441256
>>62440854
Ibiza for sure. Not the cheapest but absolutely worth it if you want to party.

62441302
>>62425521
its the false promise and fantasy of being taken out of their shithole country and back to your rich freegibs western country

62441648
>>62425420
But I like my disease free life.

62441700
>>62425535
I'm Asian, handsome with almost 6". Will I make it?

62441703
>>62441700
>6"
a little short, try being 5'8" or more

62441718
Just pay the dowry you are not welcome here and everything turn to shit quickly

item.title: /BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition — 30 replies — 26.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
/BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-07-03 03:00 UTC

OP

>rc buys 7,780,000 shares of BBBY, and $60-$80 strike calls worth 1,670,100 shares in March 2022

>rc sells shares and calls of BBBY in august 2022

>rc has a sitdown with a famous corporate raider, Carl Icahn in october 2022

>rc offers 400 million for BBBY in December 2022

>pitchbook (best M&A software suite in the world, costing 5 figures + per year) lists BBBY(now known as BBBYQ or DK-Butterfly-1) as sold via a leveraged buyout on January 13 2023

>a default on the ABL with JPM happened on the same day that pitchbook shows a leveraged buyout, the terms of that ABL specify that a default is triggered if a change of control happens, a change of control is defined as an acquisition of 40% or more of the voting power by any person or group.

>one month later, February 2023 RC tweets “someone tell the government to stop shooting down my balloons”, alluding to bad actors delaying the Bed Bath m&a

>the GameStop CEO then became a BBBYQ chapter 11 creditor and debtor

>Larry cheng (who helped RC build Chewy, and is a current boardmember at GameStop, and a close personal friend to RC) went onto theppshow podcast (which is dedicated to BBBY recovery theories) 8 months after BBBY filed for chapter 11, and 2 months after shares were cancelled

>OverStock - who is the most famous company to battle illegal naked shorts, who even released a crypto dividend 5 years ago - purchased the BBBY IP, and owns 55% of TZero - the only approved blockchain entity who can issue debt instruments and securities

>OverStock - whos now traded under ticker BBBY - has issued warrants with dates that match GME's warrants, and with a CUSIP-6 that matches BBBYQ's CUSIP-6, proving BBBYQ has already begun m&a activity with BBBY


REQUIRED READING: bbbwhy.com

>Larry Cheng and Bill Pulte have gone onto theppshow podcast

jake2b started a youtube channel to access quality BBBYQ easier than scrolling twitter posts:

https://www.youtube.com/@jake2b

previous thread:
>>62417410

Early replies (first 3)

62438274
>Larry Cheng was inside the PP show

62438733
Good morning my beautiful Towelkings.

62438734
uh... guys... you might want to check your accounts...

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62438913
>>62438733
I'm the OG catto.

62438974
>>62438913
Based. I figured we'll start to see familiar faces pop up as we inch closer to the warrant date and we learn more about the Ebay deal.

62438982
Teddy Boys.

62439137
>Kiretzu's are illegal though

62439158
k...kek b...baggies

62439169
>On my watch, the Benchobi will not PERFORM the illegal!

62439937
Nothing but happy days and sunshine ahead for the Towelkings.

62439939
holy fuck guys something BIG is happening this weekend

62439944
>>62438734
>>62439939

62440001
>>62439944
silence, shill!

62440005
>>62439939
That’s just Gabbbo finishing off her coin slot special

62440025
>>62440001

62440082
It's a fucking swarm over there! The shillies are really agitated for some reason.
>>62440004
They literally refused to defend their hatred of RC and making money.

62440084
the DD from the teddy books says 4th of July will be huge

62440352
>>62438972
Ebay shareholders gets no shares of the Holding company, if it's a all cash deal.

62441320
4th of July is the flag emoji

62441346
>>62441320
ENDGAME BABY

62441544
THE SULTAN OF SNEED LITERALLY JUST CONFIRMED WE WON
WE FUCKING WON

62441565
>Fraud payout.
>700 per bobby.
>$30916500 deposited in my Fidelity account
>40% aside for taxes
>60% dumped ito Teddy/GME
>MOASS
>????
>I have a threesome with platnum sparkles and Amelie Warren

62441579
Holy shit I just got $500 million deposited to my account!

62441599
>>62441565
so when you take off platnum's pants and her cock is bigger than yours is that a good thing or a bad thing

62441611
HOLY FUCK HOOOOLY FUCK HOLY SHIT FUCK
BATHROOM KINGS
BATHROOM GODS
WE DID IT WE WON
CELEBRATE FUCKING HARD FRIENDS

62441798
>>62441320
Yup. We gonna be kangs.
>and billionares<

62441800
>>62441565
Pretty sure fraud payouts are NOT taxed. But someone can correct me.

62441804
>>62441800
Ive checked a few times and arrived at the conclusion they are taxed. We be amazing to roll everything into gme though

62441869
>>62441800
When you get a fraud payout the IRS pays you 50%

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 197 replies — 25.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 197 • Updated: 2026-07-02 20:29 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62420874
It would appear that everyone is talking about the new WENDYs Stock

Naturally we should take some time to consider this potential moonshot. Could be a waste of time. In a few I will post information I find relevant to the stock and whether investing is the right option

62422903
Another page 9 bump

62423064
Good to see the thread is still going strong. Today is my off day, let's look into the next subject "predictive programming"

We'll start with Oliver tree

62425537
op was not a fag this thread has good vibes we should keep it going until we all make it
personally im trading perps with a system after 10 years of learning charts off/on but finally committing
did a 32x in 2021 and should have been able to retire but didnt anticipate the biden years so here we are going pure psycho mode like we did back then but even harder until money is /solved/, then I'll keep trading for the love of the game cuz it's the best sport in the world

62425849
>>62423064
This shit is way too schizo. No anon you can not predict the future. You can maybe foresee some type of market trends, seasonality or whatever but this is just ridiculous

62425890
>>62425537
Got any good tips/ressources on learning to trade charts? trying to get into it too

62427228
>>62425849
I concede. I'll look for a more productive venture but I won't let the thread or general die, it will be some time before value is struck, I will admit that. I can be tenacious if nothing else.

62428130
>>62425890
emperorBTC's telegram has a basic bitch tldr set of material to learn from. also has a youtube where he goes over stuff. that's where I started and I like that he focuses on the absolute basics, although he leans heavily towards confirmation w/ volume which others may disagree with. btc focused but btc/crypto is perhaps the most effective use of TA.
basically there's no need to get fancy and the chart is the final source of truth because what the price does > what people cope and/or seethe about
support/resistance levels and price action with risk management (defined r:r) = compound as you get gud
once you commit you'll realize "the catch" on people actually make money from trading is is simply how retarded the overwhelming majority of people are that they simply cannot manage a few simple tenets to click buttons and make money, you likely being one of them if you don't develop a process and risk too much on trades
gl anon

62428141
>>62428130
also perps have exploded so trading equities for crypto natives has been a pleasure to avoid tradfi gatekeeping bs
follow the right people on twatter with alerts set to on and it's like having multiple research firms giving alpha for free-- key word "right" accounts. hopefully you have the pattern recognition to figure out which are spewing paid channel larps and which are providing genuine insight
that's basically the whole game. if you can get into a group chat with other chads that's even better because a network is stronger than you alone, although this is def an arena where it ultimately comes down to you mastering yourself (you can't copy trade your way to wealth but you can learn what others do/how they enter/exit positions)
legend trade is a new perps platform that's gamifying this if you wanna start there instead of hyperliquid (front-end using hyperliquid)
Also bigtrout300 on twitter and join his tg as well he's pretty dope. There's a lot of great accounts posting good shit right now. Some really good posters fade in/out of cycles while the scammers/extractors are always abundant, but just use discretion

62428170
>pic related
>"...focus on the chart as these information is very likely to be priced in already"
the "TA is astrology for men" line is used to make fun of retards who take it too far and treat it like divination when in reality it's all stacking probabilities/confluence in your favor as best you can, and from the above example you can see relying on your feed for information will almost always be slower than the chart

62428488
Finally some good posts

62428503
>>62428141
Big trout doesn't post on Twitter and his TG hasn't had activity since May. Any other suggestions?

62428780
>>62428503
His tg is BigTroutTrade and he posts on twitter all the time wdym

62428797
>>62428780
BigTrout Trading on youtube as well

other X goats that have been killing it IMO recently:
@MoneyPrinter0x
and my personal favorite currently:
@Wild_Randomness

there's tons of alpha just follow those people, then see what they repost, then follow the people they interact with that provide research, and even or especially follow the chinese/korean/japanese accounts that post comprehensive semiconductor/other market effort posts since translation is seamless now
never been a better time to go full NEET

62429207
>>62428797
But you're still under $10k?

62429246
>>62378965
Anon Belgium is literally doing very well in the world cup, you should make more of these predictions

62431586
bump.

62431599
probably nothing
bio protocol desci ai BIO now cookin with open ai, nvidia, anthropic, claude news check twita

62432055
>>62373752
Hey
I just started out in this crypto thing and bought $450 worth of solana. How do I become cool and multiply it

62432088
>>62432055
Be like me and listen to people within a group of other retards that are pushing a token. The last one tanked a $200 investment -98% but then he re-deployed the same token and it yielded a 40x from where it was called.

62432306
>>62432088
pardon my incompetence but I didn't understand much of what you just wrote anon

62432350
>>62428797
I had bad experiences following twitter people and waiting for signals even those that seem smart. It can be interesting but you’ll be lost if they randomly stop posting, they’re not funds giving you alpha but people that should have better things to do than post if their full job is actually trading.

I do still like @donalt and @cryptocred their show technical roundup is a rare non clickbaity show that just focuses on TA but most people are inherently frauds on social media

62432360
>>62432055
I don’t think Solana is a good buy right now it’s barely holding support and likely going lower to like 40 if I remember correctly

>>62432088
If you have a group like that be a hero to the community and share it to us

62432373
>>62432360
>be a hero to the community and share it to us
see
>>62385756
I recently held an airdrop for /biz/ too

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/62424715

62434369
Bump, I'm getting an early weekend because of the country's birthday. Will devote time to this thread.

62435112
>>62432350
skill issue. donalt? lol
you gotta follow the small accounts anon

62436077
>>62435112
Why would you rely on random accounts calls and not build the skill yourself? You are just fucked if you only listen to others, and you have no way to know they aren’t just lucky for a while until they drag you down with themselves

>donalt
Yes he may be old and washed but you can still learn a lot from two traders that never shilled some memecoin. Except for ftx but I guess everyone had an ftx sponsorship for a while

62436265
>UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD
>200 REPLIES

LMAOOOOOOOOOOOOOO OH NO NO NO NO AAAAAAAHHHHHH

62437580
>>62436077
did you read my first post? i literally said not to just blindly copy trade
there's nothing wrong with using great traders as confluence

62440778
bamp.

item.title: VOO and Chill — 179 replies — 18.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 179 • Updated: 2026-07-02 18:25 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62426173
>>62426154
Or honestly, as someone already in VOO, I wonder if it makes sense to just go into something like VGT which has consistently beaten VOO and QQQ (for now anyway) or something like DRAM
A lot of VGTs holdings are currently down but it’s YTD is higher

62426183
>>62407078
I keep half of my funds in VTWAX, rebalancing annually. Right now I'm down 0.84% this year, my portfolio is fucked but VTWAX is my safety net.

62427417
I am also curious about DRAM can anyone tell me if it’s a good hold for a short while

62428031
jfc DRAM (ie a thematic ETF) is bullshit made for retard retail investors that get their financial advice from grifters off of tiktok. this happens every time a finance topic hits the news and every time people get burned.
barely worth saying. if you're unironically taking advice from /biz/ you're already doomed intellectually.

62428054
>>62428031
but why exactly, what reason is there to believe the companies within it won't continue to turn a profit for the foreseeable future?

62428080
>>62428031
>>62428054
Like I'm serious, what exactly is wrong about holding it and selling once memory cools down, is it smarter to just go into a more volatile ETF that at least has a longer history if you want more returns, is it just hype and not really the next big thing, explain why

62428238
>>62428080
this is basic finance 101, there are plenty of resources online or off that will explain it to you.
ignorance isn't even the issue here, your reaction to not knowing something is to have random retards on a thinly veiled gambling board tell you what to think. and don't just jump on another grifter selling a course or ask some AI slop engine and ask it leading questions like "why is investing in DRAM a good idea?".

62428337
>>62428238
In other words you don't know

62429683
>>62400493
Anon there is nothing wrong with doing VOO and chill if you have time and principal
Going into wildly volatile ETFs can be okay if it’s a satellite account
Just be careful of FOMO and not being risk averse
You sound like you have a good head on your shoulders though
Remember this is money, real money, your money

62430693
VOO anons where you at?

62430902
>>62400493
Contrarian nerds always lose.
Always.
In middle school dating.
Being high school incels.
In college.
At work.
In love.
At investing.
At all times.
Follow the crowd and try to fit in. Everyone doing anything else is a reject loser.

62431131
>>62430902
Who is being the contrarian here though

62431374
VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses, Michelle Louie & Aurélie Denis. So with your 0.03% management fee you're essentially paying for those do-nothing "day in the life of a portfolio manager" videos for daughters of elite sociopaths.

62431402
>>62431374
A small price to pay for a low expense ratio

62431920
>>62431131
Anyone trying to beat VOO over decades.

62431922
>>62431920
Feel like VUG has consistently beaten VOO though

62431971
>>62431922
Contrarian.
I own VUG and don't own VOO tho :)

62432023
>>62431920
fair enough
thoughts on a younger person doing QQQM?

62434054
Anyone have thoughts or realized returns and experiences on VOO + satellite
accounts instead of just VOO

62435372
Was gonna try to go into this DRAM dip but decided to just do more VOO
But idk a higher return ETF still sounds promising and like a no brainer whether it’s SOXX or QQQM but QQQ has so much crossover with VOO it’s just redundant and only good for growth seasons
I guess this is why VOO and Chill exists to just stop thinking

62436303
>>62431920
What about QQQ though

62436357
i boughted my daily VOO
i'll keep dealing the real world like a good goyim in the mean time.

62436478
>>62436357
huzzah brother

62436499
>>62400493
Where my VGT bros at?

62436507
>>62400636
>Yes and I'm sure that used car and maybe a holiday you can buy with it when you're 65 from cashing out all your investments will be great.....
You say this as if the average /biz/ shitcoin gambler is performing better than VOO which is definitely not the case.

62436510
>>62428031
Your IQ is so actually low. Holy shit.

62436538
>>62436510
Do you think DRAM has value, honest question, and for how long - if so, what dip should one wait for
>>62436499
VGT and QQQ are only doing better thanks to tech having such strong performances for years now, correct?
VOO seems safe since you don't know the future, but on the other hand, thinking the future of the market for the next decades wont always be tech focused seems so short sighted it's silly.....maybe I should start DCA into VGT?

62436562
>>62400493
>VOO
it's EVOO for me lads

62438775
Yep bros
Bought some more VOO and am waiting on my DRAM position to go green so I can sell and not have to deal with thematic ETFs no high expense ratios ever again
Simple as

62440169
>>62431374
>VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses
VOO is passively managed. These 2 girls are not like Kathy Wood picking stocks.

item.title: SPCX — 22 replies — 17.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
SPCX

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-07-03 02:49 UTC

OP

I'M GOING ALL IN ON SPACEX!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62437633
>>62437620
Nice. I was thinking of day trading SSPC after days it pumps for the next few months myself. Would've made some nice money if I did that today like I considered. I fucking knew 170 was fake and gay I should've done it why do I gotta be such a scared money bitch?

62437642
>>62437633
yeah i really thought it was gonna rebound. what do you think will happen on july 7th?

62437652
>>62437642
Probably pumps a bit but fails to retake highs and continues downtrending for awhile but I'm big retarded man don't ask me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62437654
>>62437642
you'll be a rich man, but not as rich as if you'd bought calls

62438271
>>62437620

62438669
>>62437620
It's dead. It will crab at IPO price or just keep going down. Did you really fall for that dead cat bounce at 170? It's not gonna bounce up again like that. You get maybe 1 more mini weekly cycle of measly gains before you're holding the bag.

62438863
yikes

62439632
>>62437620
Oof

62439676
SPCX bros...
>>62427489
>>62427900

62439734
it makes no sense to buy this expecting to get rich.. most tech stocks had crazy returns because they started with a low market cap. even if spcx does a 2x it would be almost be the largest company in the world. is a 2x all you need to get rich? the downside is massive and the upside is mediocre

62439870
>>62437642
Is this what people wear to go out in America?

62439919
>$156
FUUUUUUUUAAARRRRRRRKKKKK i took out of me retirement for this

62440414
>>62437620
how the fuck is SPCX still above $100. what a fucking loony world

62440602
>>62437620

I have buy orders going all they way down to $20

62440636
>>62439734
>company owns all the world, is a defense company. is a logistics company and an AI company. with datacenters in space they can net compute globally.
SpaceX is undervalued. its true worth is like 500 before the split. 10,000 in 3-4 years.
and 100,000 in 10 years.

62440683
>>62440636
lets not forget its also a telecommunications company. thats like a space age GE.

in 5 years there will be people on this board going. wow, all i had to do is buy 100 shares of spacex and set up a trust with it when it launched and the next 10 generations of my family would be secured against economic problems. but today. you fuckers are sitting around contemplating fundementals and shit. talking shit about the CEO and not investing in the litteral space company. this was a gift. turn your freedom paper in to space credits now retards.

62440698
>>62437652
>>62438669
these retards are probably right though they will make it cheaper as the stock becomes unlocked and people take profit. you already know that wetback welder is gonna dump his shares as soon as it unlocks.

62440743
>>62437620
You're making a very good choice Sir. Many moons await you. Brahma smiles upon the bold.

62441357
Bought pre-IPO, bought post IPO, and will continue buying any weakness. Don’t care what anyone says. Will never consider selling my shares. SPCX will not fail.

62441383
>>62437620

Patriots are in control. Don’t worry.

62441594
>>62437620
>SPCX yolo
It's going to crash on Tuesday or Wednesday after the forced buying ends. It gets added to the Nasdaq 100 on Tuesday morning, so funds must buy it. After that, they don't need to buy and more, and speculators who were front running the forced buying will be selling, selling into... nothing. The current weakness in AI stocks is going to make it worse.

62441853
and just like that.

item.title: Could always be worse — 52 replies — 15.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Could always be worse

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-07-03 00:44 UTC

OP

You could be a German wagie.

>no more AC
>no more sick leave

These are the early signs of a collapsing country. Just wait until the food riots hit.

Early replies (first 3)

62438577
former Blackrock manager is chancellor now, imagine.

62438607
>>62438545
Do you have to send this shit to govt? What if the employer doesn’t give a shit is someone going to audit this?

62438687
>>62438607
If this is anything like Germany's neighbouring country that I live in then the doctor sends it to the government when he inputs it into the system, and then it goes to your employer automatically from there so he knows whether to honour it or not.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62439638
Dont worry the millions of muslims theyve imported are surely patriotic and will selflessly sacrifice to help turn the nation around ;)

62439862
>>62438545
>hello my fellow slav...germans, you need to work harder to pay for boomers pensions/healthcare, brownies, single moms, rich people and corporations
>don't forget to make a few slav. i mean kids by the way, we need more but we won't give you any help

i am so tired of this nightmare World

62439890
Germans need to work harder so that the immigrants can receive more benefits and afford more kids to out breed the Germans and replace them.

Get to work, cucks.

62439910
>>62439868
pls don't rape us

62440179
>>62438789
b00t
>>62438870
also b0t
>>62438917
still b0000t
>>62438929
what if you were a butterfly
>>62438968
thats communist
bots, we deserve bettter

62440228
>>62440179
Mediocre bait, here's what (You) desperately crave

62440552
>>62438545
Oooooooo wagie

62440561
boomer pensions need to be paid

62440631
>>62438545
>These are the early signs of a collapsing country
can you give an example of a country that collapsed because they wanted doctor's notes for sick leave?

62440641
>>62438770
>The problem with most of these "far right" parties, are that they have quasi-leftist economic policies.
Like the Danish People Party which happens to be the most effective anti immigration party of all time

62440666
>>62438545
there's free food and shelter in the military. time to suit up for israel!

62440717
i don't remember the last time i called in sick, but if the popular thing is to have stricter rules and it will make people stop voting for afd so they get less money to plaster their hideous faces everywhere, i'm all for it. i don't care about politics, but there must be a requirement for afd members to be disfigured in some way

62440944
>get flu
>can barely get out of bed and best thing for you is rest
>Have to drag yourself outside while in pain, prolonging your recovery.

How does this make sense?

62441057
NET
ZERO
LMFAO

62441097
>>62438545
U vill vork to pay ze Toorks

62441112
>>62438545
>no more sick leave

>Hello doctor I have a headache and can't go to work.
>sure thing. Stay home for the rest of the week.

62441324
>>62438545
Kek how the fuck would needing a doctors certificate at the first day of illness ”improve competitiveness”? Europe didn’t need this kind of american slave shit to be able to compete before. What a retarded rule that will get abolished fast.

>>62438690
It’s funny how even in white countries we get retards like you who are easily fooled into letting foreign agents run your country.

62441365
>>62438545
German wagies are literally the biggest milking cow in the world. Reminder if you include every tax, from forced tv tax (even if you dont have a tv) to VAT, to social taxes you and your employee has to make, from 100 Euro earned around 33 remain. Fucking crazy.

62441372
>>62441324
>>62438744
You know Merz is the foreign agent? No?

62441375
>>62441365
yet the gubberment and companies wonder why nobody wants to wörk anymore......!

62441387
>>62439638
>>62440561
Yeah this is the Moment german boomers retire (60s had really a lot of kids here) and all the brown experts who came here will pay them their pension. Its really a master plan. It will work beautifully? I know the economy did not grow since 7 years but any moment now it will turn around. Maybe more tax on energy and we can go.

62441401
>>62441375
Yeah im hoping this spirals out of control for them. It has the potential
1.extreme high taxes and extreme high energy costs with absurd regulation
2.production shuts down, real wages get lower fast and competent young people leave
3.government refuses to cut spending effectively and cut regulation (thats a given the sytem is too entrenched, has to increase taxes even more, and inflation increases aswell
4.first point intensifying

62441402
>>62441372
The truth is they're all foreign agents. Wasn't Merkel ex-Stasi or something like that? AfD isn't the answer because they're just more of the same wearing the mask of being something different.

62441424
>>62441401
I would tell you Ivan to go away but i know you’re exactly at the right place if you want to turn retards against their own country and continent.

62441427
>>62438545
Isn't germany's woes due to getting rid of their nuclear reactors which are the only source of reliable energy that isn't a scam?

62441433
>>62438545
Germans a generally insufferable and completely brainwashed regarding their glorious past. 12 years not a slave.

62441451
>>62441402
>everyone is in on it!
While mostly true there comes a point where there are enemy factions.
Otherwise we would already have a world gov.
Anglosphere still bows to england and so does russia, japan and china.

62441472
>>62441451
Yeah and AfD with it’s obvious russian backing is an enemy faction, no matter how much it claims to be against immigrants and wokeism.

62441478
>>62438545
but i am
and -40% ytd
and fat
and no gf

62441575
>>62441375
For decades we've had this system and everyone was happy. The problem is that the economy is failing because German is very reliant on cheap energy which we've chosen to avoid ever since the ukraine war. If we had pivoted hard into manufacturing renewables or simply having kids we'd be fine.

>>62441427
The reactors we had weren't very good. Nowadays everyone is pro-nuclear because they're thinking of reactor types that weren't even conceptualized 10 years ago. Our problems are that we were reliant on cheap energy which we didn't bother producing and that we have no kids.

item.title: >if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT — 51 replies — 14.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-07-03 00:40 UTC

OP

>if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT

Early replies (first 3)

62433628
But saaaaaar isnt this normal in india and all civilized places? Only in the so called united states of america they kick their kids out

62433637
>>62433628
anything that isnt jewish is indian because.... because it just is, okay!!!!

62433641
All you need is a half million dollar down payment and you can get your mortgage payment down to $4,250 per month on your loan against a million dollar house. Then you can live in the desert on top of your neighbors with trees that will fall over during the first rains and slight breeze because they don't belong in a desert.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62436581
>>62435510
Boomers, and some older GenX (like Dave), really are out of touch when it comes to the importance of parental assistance.
The era of bootstrap-pulling is long over, and any mildly observant millennial or zoomer has probably noticed by now that their successful peers almost always got help (and a lot of it) from mom and dad.
And it's never been easier to notice this, given how over-exposed people are, thanks to social media, wikip etc.

62436586
>>62435864
Your family can’t be that rich. There’s just no way they’d kick you out at 17 if they were. It’s just not something actually rich people do.

62436615
>>62436306
his callers arent financially stable people whose lives are going well lmao

62436749
>>62435864
>filling fell out
>>62435864
>need a root canal
>>62435864
>first kid died
>>62435864
>optimistic
nigga brush your teeth and put down the meth pipe

62436842
>>62436586
Get a job you little brat.

62436889
>>62436581
My uncle offered to help me get a job and then never called me back. My mom completely refused to help me because "nepotism". Boomers ruined my life.
>get a lot of it
I knew a girl who was whining she couldn't afford rent because she divorced her black husband for beating her, then talked about how her parents gave her 'only' 100k for a downpayment on a house.

Lol.

62436891
>>62436306
He literally gave all his kids from different marriages manager jobs at his company.

>>62436615
So they should make their kids' lives shitty too?

62436914
>>62436581
>The era of bootstrap-pulling is long over
It isn't, no matter how hard your lazy entitled ass wishes it were.

62436916
>>62436889
>My uncle offered to help me get a job and then never called me back.
So why didn't you call him back? Show a little initiative for once in your life.

62437070
>>62436889
>”WAAAAHHHH MOMMY HELP ME HELP ME MOMMY!!!”
Lmao I always feel like such a chad when I come to this site.

62437244
>>62436914
>>62436916
>>62437070

62437592
>>62433626
My parents were shocked when I told them I was moving out at age 26. I had finished grad school and secured a 6 figure salary career but they still wanted me to live with them rent-free. White people are weird as fuck.

62437754
>>62434079
>starter home
nigger if its not a mansion then its just a fucking home
retarded buzz words trying to normalize the destruction of the middle class aren't real

62437769
>be zoomer
>starter homes costs 50 years salary

62437771
>>62437754
Starter homes are a thing just like starter cars

62438138
>>62436581
Ramsey is a boomer.

62438159
he gave all his kids fake email jobs in his company
what else is there to say

62438420
>>62435117
>100k saved when earned 189k last 3 years
could be better, could be worse. Actually it is decent because you saved over 50%. I saved up 55k at 22 already while working for a year now. Mind you, it is in a different currency because I'm an europoor.

My internship I had for half a year paid 47k/year so like 3900 a month. The second one now pays 5k/month and I try to save 3k for a house, put 1k into stock market and the rest are for expenses.

So yeah, also not bad but not perfect since apartments here cost like 500-800k easily. I just don't want to be like all my friends who plan to move out after 30.

62438432
>>62438420
What internship in europe is paying 3900 a month?

62438454
>>62433626
Not sure if kikes do this but it's just so lowly, stingy and jewish to charge rent to your kids. What are you, poor?
My parents had me while I saved to buy up front no jew mortgage. I'll never charge my kids either, I don't want their money and I don't prefer being alone, I love my family and all that. I'll also leave them generational wealth like my father will, but I'll teach them to be entirely self-sufficient and build wealth by the time they even see the number.

62438474
>>62436891
if he gave everyone else jobs except you, that would clearly say that it was your problem that prevented him, maybe you should ask. Aspergers

62441222
>>62438454

It’s not about the money, it’s about teaching them the value of a dollar .

62441264
>>62438159
I'm happy he didn't ruin their lives.

62441268
>>62436914
Everyone with this mentality is going to be removed from the gene pool. That is your bootstraps.

62441344
The weirdest thing about this board are mindbroken losers like defending boomers for the keks and lels.

62441345
>>62441264
>give like no one else
But not to your kids!

62441355
>>62441345
You can't read

62441358
>>62441344
Call your uncle back you little whiny brat.

62441547
>>62433637
I was referring to his grammar.

62441559
>>62433626
Boomers are entitled to this piece of land. There is nothing you can do about it.
You own nothing you happy.
